source_pr.body:

symptoms: {"select *, sum(sale) over (partition by y order by sale) total from t where sale>? order by y", []ExecCase{ (executor/prepared_test.go)
failure_signature: {"select *, sum(sale) over (partition by y order by sale) total from t where sale>? order by y", []ExecCase{ (executor/prepared_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly adds more prepared-plan-cache test cases (varied operators). The evidence captured here is a test-case snippet (already containing ORDER BY), not a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization fix.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: {"select *, sum(sale) over (partition by y order by sale) total from t where sale>? order by y", []ExecCase{ (executor/prepared_test.go)
